name: Hope Edge I
description:
A long sword made specifically
for the expedition. A blade
imbued with spirit to aid its
mighty swings.

name: Hope Edge II
description:
A long sword made specifically
for the expedition. A blade
imbued with spirit to aid its
mighty swings.

name: Hope Edge III
description:
A long sword made specifically
for the expedition. A blade
imbued with spirit to aid its
mighty swings.

name: Hope Edge IV
description:
A long sword made specifically
for the expedition. A blade
imbued with spirit to aid its
mighty swings.

name: Hope Edge V
description:
A long sword made specifically
for the expedition. A blade
imbued with spirit to aid its
mighty swings.

name: Rey Tonitrus I
description:
A long sword imbued with Rey
Dau's thunder. Adversaries
buckle with one kiss from its
conductive edge.

name: Rey Tonitrus II
description:
A long sword imbued with Rey
Dau's thunder. Adversaries
buckle with one kiss from its
conductive edge.

name: Rey Tonitrus III
description:
A long sword imbued with Rey
Dau's thunder. Adversaries
buckle with one kiss from its
conductive edge.

name: Tonitrus Clairblade
description:
An upgraded Rey Tonitrus.
With one flash of its edge,
rocks sunder and thick shocks
of lightning hail down.

name: Khanga Edge I
description:
Made of Seregios blades,
its golden sheen will
never fade no matter how
many times it is polished.

name: Khanga Rebellion
description:
A revolutionary blade,
this enhanced version of
the Khanga Edge can cut
through absolutely anything.

name: Stahlfakt I
description:
An eldritch Gore Magala long
sword that condemns wielders
to anguish and beholders to
eternal damnation.

name: Stahlrecht
description:
An upgraded Stahlfakt. Its bite
confers eternal pain, a hell that
forever denies the relief of death.

name: Uth Khlunda I
description:
An Uth Duna long sword.
A water-soaked scabbard keeps
the thirsty blade sated and
maintains its gleam.

name: Uth Khlunda II
description:
An Uth Duna long sword.
A water-soaked scabbard keeps
the thirsty blade sated and
maintains its gleam.

name: Uth Khlunda III
description:
An Uth Duna long sword.
A water-soaked scabbard keeps
the thirsty blade sated and
maintains its gleam.

name: Khlunda-of-the-Waves
description:
An upgraded Uth Khlunda. With
a gallant blade like this,
a worthy warrior could part
the raging tides.

name: Windclaw Blade I
description:
Made from Hirabami materials,
this long sword's curved blade
carves a unique path when
slicing foes.

name: Windclaw Blade II
description:
Made from Hirabami materials,
this long sword's curved blade
carves a unique path when
slicing foes.

name: Windclaw Blade III
description:
Made from Hirabami materials,
this long sword's curved blade
carves a unique path when
slicing foes.

name: Windclaw Kiribami
description:
An upgraded Windclaw Blade said
to have been wielded by a great
hero. The force of its attacks is
sure to overwhelm any opponent.

name: Quematrice Lima I
description:
A Quematrice long sword that
sprays oil from its scabbard on
the draw to ignite the blade.

name: Quematrice Lima II
description:
A Quematrice long sword that
sprays oil from its scabbard on
the draw to ignite the blade.

name: Quematrice Lima III
description:
A Quematrice long sword that
sprays oil from its scabbard on
the draw to ignite the blade.

name: Quematrice Lima IV
description:
A Quematrice long sword that
sprays oil from its scabbard on
the draw to ignite the blade.

name: Firetrail Ferrocere
description:
An upgraded Quematrice Lima.
To approach this gnash of fire
is to embrace one's immolation.

name: Iron Katana I
description:
A sword forged with historic
Eastern techniques. Durable,
but requires regular upkeep.

name: Iron Katana II
description:
A sword forged with historic
Eastern techniques. Durable,
but requires regular upkeep.

name: Iron Katana III
description:
A sword forged with historic
Eastern techniques. Durable,
but requires regular upkeep.

name: Keen Edge
description:
The saw-like teeth of this
blade makes it deadly, but
requires much training to
utilize effectively.

name: Wyvern Blade "Ash" I
description:
A Guardian Rathalos long sword.
Like a blazing fire, its
wielder's spirit never abates.

name: Wyvern Blade "Ash" II
description:
A Guardian Rathalos long sword.
Like a blazing fire, its
wielder's spirit never abates.

name: Wyvern Blade "Lily"
description:
An upgraded Wyvern Blade "Ash."
A regal soul rests within its
immaculate flood of power.

name: Wyvern Blade "Blood" I
description:
A Rathalos long sword hued
like the rust of the setting sun.
Each cut delivers burning agony.

name: Wyvern Blade "Maple"
description:
The upgraded form of the
Wyvern Blade "Blood." With
twilight strokes, it paints the
world's fiery end.

name: Wyvern Blade "Verde" I
description:
A Rathian long sword with
the same deep green hues,
this masterwork achieves
sharpness and power alike.

name: Wyvern Blade "Verde" II
description:
A Rathian long sword with
the same deep green hues,
this masterwork achieves
sharpness and power alike.

name: Wyvern Blade "Holly"
description:
The upgraded form of the Wyvern
Blade "Verde." Its sharpness
and power can only be called
peerless.

name: Barina Flamberge I
description:
A Lala Barina long sword with
a monochrome blade and scabbard,
and a bite that leaves prey
paralyzed.

name: Barina Flamberge II
description:
A Lala Barina long sword with
a monochrome blade and scabbard,
and a bite that leaves prey
paralyzed.

name: Barina Flamberge III
description:
A Lala Barina long sword with
a monochrome blade and scabbard,
and a bite that leaves prey
paralyzed.

name: Barina Flamberge IV
description:
A Lala Barina long sword with
a monochrome blade and scabbard,
and a bite that leaves prey
paralyzed.

name: Lala Ornithocton
description:
An upgraded Barina Flamberge.
Each effortless slash leaves
crimson evidence of its
superior make.

name: Blood Cry I
description:
A slender long sword resembling
a Nerscylla's leg, so sharp
that prey die before feeling
its sting.

name: Blood Cry II
description:
A slender long sword resembling
a Nerscylla's leg, so sharp
that prey die before feeling
its sting.

name: Blood Cry III
description:
A slender long sword resembling
a Nerscylla's leg, so sharp
that prey die before feeling
its sting.

name: Blood Scream
description:
The Blood Cry's upgraded form—
its supple blade now thickened
out for additional rigidity.

name: Bone Shotel I
description:
A long sword carved from bone.
Excess weight has been pared
away to allow for a quick flurry
of blows.

name: Bone Shotel II
description:
A long sword carved from bone.
Excess weight has been pared
away to allow for a quick flurry
of blows.

name: Bone Shotel III
description:
A long sword carved from bone.
Excess weight has been pared
away to allow for a quick flurry
of blows.

name: Bone Shotel IV
description:
A long sword carved from bone.
Excess weight has been pared
away to allow for a quick flurry
of blows.

name: Hard Bone Shotel
description:
Thorough polishing has
sharpened the Bone Shotel into
a razor edge that rivals metal.

name: Gnashing Fulgur I
description:
A Guardian Fulgur Anjanath
long sword. Only one able to
tame its brutality through
reason can wield it.

name: Fulgurblade Guardiana
description:
An upgraded Gnashing Fulgur.
Its savage urges thwart reason
and will destroy an overeager
wielder.

name: Rompo Hacker I
description:
A serrated Rompopolo long
sword laced with toxins that
facilitate simultaneous
resection and poisoning.

name: Rompo Hacker II
description:
A serrated Rompopolo long
sword laced with toxins that
facilitate simultaneous
resection and poisoning.

name: Rompo Hacker III
description:
A serrated Rompopolo long
sword laced with toxins that
facilitate simultaneous
resection and poisoning.

name: Rompo Mytoxin
description:
An upgraded Rompo Hacker with
improved severing efficiency.
The more the prey struggles, the
more potent its venom becomes.

name: Dosha Fatecleaver I
description:
A Doshaguma long sword that
springs with a howl from its
scabbard at the first sight
of an adversary.

name: Dosha Fatecleaver II
description:
A Doshaguma long sword that
springs with a howl from its
scabbard at the first sight
of an adversary.

name: Dosha Fatecleaver III
description:
A Doshaguma long sword that
springs with a howl from its
scabbard at the first sight
of an adversary.

name: Blanberge I
description:
A Blangonga long sword with
a distinct rippled blade.
On the draw, it unleashes
a tsunami of amplified cold.

name: Blangongaberge
description:
An upgraded Blanberge.
One flash of this icy blade
could sunder a fire god and
freeze him to the soul.

name: Dosha Gravecleaver I
description:
A Guardian Doshaguma long
sword. To its defiers it shows
no mercy, brutally returning
them to nature.

name: Dosha Gravecleaver II
description:
A Guardian Doshaguma long
sword. To its defiers it shows
no mercy, brutally returning
them to nature.

name: Gravecleaver Urkemush
description:
An upgraded Dosha Gravecleaver.
Its destructive impulses
transform wielders into violence
incarnate.

name: G. Veldian Ensis I
description:
A long sword made from Guardian
spoils. When facing a wyvern,
its hilt seems to nestle
closer in hand.

name: G. Veldian Ensis II
description:
A long sword made from Guardian
spoils. When facing a wyvern,
its hilt seems to nestle
closer in hand.

name: G. Righteous Lancelot
description:
An upgraded G. Veldian Ensis.
It exists for the sake of others,
its edge trained upon injustice.

name: Veldian Ensis I
description:
An Arkveld long sword. A weapon
like this once hung at the side
of a wyvern-hunting knight.

name: Artian Saber I
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. The mass
of matter at its core maintains
its high sharpness.

name: Artian Saber II
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. The mass
of matter at its core maintains
its high sharpness.

name: Dimensius
description:
An ancient weapon with latent
potential. In its original
form, its blade could part
space itself.

name: Zoh Rafel I
description:
A Zoh Shia long sword with
a shroud that wards against
death.

name: Blazing Rafel
description:
Rafel harketh from on high:
Thou who seekest protection,
may thy swinging blade guard
against even thy reincarnation.

name: Esperanza Edge
description:
A fully field-tested Hope Edge.
A hundred slashes cut a
thousand walls, opening
a path to tomorrow.

name: Fatecleaver Kimkemush
description:
An upgraded Dosha Fatecleaver.
Like an angry, thirsty fang,
it craves blood—anyone's,
everyone's.

name: Righteous Lancelot
description:
An upgraded Veldian Ensis.
Its knight-wielder felled any who
threatened an ideal kingdom.

name: Kakaru Kumo Naki I
description:
The katana of a samurai war
hero. Beautiful and deadly
in equal measure.

name: Tamonowo
description:
The upgraded Kakaru Kumo
Naki. Cuts life's threads with
decisiveness.

name: Thunderclap I
description:
A Lagiacrus long sword crafted
with Eastern methods. Blue-
white sparks run down its blade.

name: Heaven's Thunder
description:
An upgraded Thunderclap
that feels like wielding
a bolt of lightning straight
from the heavens.

name: Headsman's Hamus
description:
As death swallows all, the
cycle of rebirth shall be destroyed.
The screams of those now cut off
shall be heard forever more.

name: Headsman's Hamus
description:
As death swallows all, the
cycle of rebirth shall be destroyed.
The screams of those now cut off
shall be heard forever more.

name: Scavenger Pickaxe
description:
A pickaxe-looking long sword
filled with the spirit of its
ore-crazy master. Mine away!

name: Mad Scavenger Pickaxe
description:
A Scavenger Pickaxe tempered by
thousands of swings. Entrust your
dreams to the vein, and mine.

name: Headsman's Hamus
description:
As death swallows all, the
cycle of rebirth shall be destroyed.
The screams of those now cut off
shall be heard forever more.
